tasks.subject: Task 1: Event log filter panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a collapsible filter panel to `EventLog.vue` with multi-select type pills, repo/arch dropdowns, and a package name text filter.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/EventLog.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Filter toggle button appears right-aligned on the time window row; shows "Filter · N" with purple tint when N > 0
- [ ] Clicking the toggle expands/collapses the filter panel
- [ ] Type pills show only types present in the current events prop; clicking toggles a type in/out of the active set; active pills are coloured, inactive are muted
- [ ] Repo dropdown lists unique repos from the events prop (sorted); "All repos" when empty
- [ ] Arch dropdown lists unique arches from the events prop (sorted); "All arches" when empty
- [ ] Package input filters events by case-insensitive substring on `event.what`
- [ ] "✕ clear" button resets all filters; only shown when activeFilterCount > 0
- [ ] "N in window" count reflects filtered count, not raw prop count
- [ ] `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` exits 0

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` → exits 0 with no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/EventLog.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Filter toggle button appears right-aligned, shows count badge when active", "Type pills show only present types, active pills coloured", "Repo and arch dropdowns populated from events prop", "Package input filters by case-insensitive substring on event.what", "Clear button resets all filters", "Event count reflects filtered count", "vue-tsc --noEmit exits 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
